insert-page-range-into-pdf.title: Insert Page Range from One PDF into Another
insert-page-range-into-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a specific range of pages from a source PDF file into a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

insert-specific-pages-into-pdf.title: Insert Specific Pages from One PDF into Another
insert-specific-pages-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert selected pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a given position using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-pages-at-beginning-of-pdf.title: Insert Pages at Beginning of PDF using PdfFileEditor
insert-pages-at-beginning-of-pdf.description: Shows how to insert all pages from a source PDF at the start of a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor class.

batch-insert-page-ranges-into-pdf.title: Batch Insert Page Ranges into PDF
batch-insert-page-ranges-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to sequentially insert specific page ranges from multiple source PDFs into a base PDF, producing a merged document using Aspose.Pdf.

split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified End Page
split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page.description: Shows how to split a PDF document from the first page up to a given end page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save the front part to a new file.

insert-pdf-pages-and-save-output.title: Insert PDF Pages and Save Result
insert-pdf-pages-and-save-output.description: Demonstrates how to insert selected pages from one PDF into another PDF at a specific position using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save the modified document to a file.

insert-pages-into-pdf-from-memory.title: Insert Pages into PDF from Memory Streams
insert-pages-into-pdf-from-memory.description: Demonstrates loading destination and source PDFs from byte arrays, inserting selected pages at a specific position using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor, and returning the merged PDF as a MemoryStream.

load-pdf-document-using-aspose-pdf.title: Load PDF Document Using Aspose.Pdf
load-pdf-document-using-aspose-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file from a file path with Aspose.Pdf's Document class and shows how PdfFileEditor can be used for file‑based operations such as page extraction.

insert-pages-into-pdf-at-position.title: Insert Pages from One PDF into Another at a Specific Position
insert-pages-into-pdf-at-position.description: Shows how to insert a range of pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a given middle position using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

split-pdf-front-part-using-splitfromfirs.title: Split PDF Front Part Using SplitFromFirst
split-pdf-front-part-using-splitfromfirs.description: Demonstrates how to extract the first N pages of a PDF and save them as a new document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitFromFirst.

append-pages-to-pdf.title: Append Pages from One PDF to Another
append-pages-to-pdf.description: Shows how to append all pages of a source PDF to the end of a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

split-pdf-from-page-to-end.title: Split PDF from Specific Page to End
split-pdf-from-page-to-end.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF starting at a given page to the end of the document using Aspose.Pdf's Document and PdfFileEditor classes.

split-pdf-into-individual-page-files.title: Split PDF into Individual Page Files
split-pdf-into-individual-page-files.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate page streams using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save each stream as a uniquely named PDF file.

split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets.title: Split PDF into Bulk Page Sets Using MemoryStreams
split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets.description: Shows how to split a PDF stream into multiple page‑range bulks and obtain each part as a MemoryStream with Aspose.Pdf.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Page Files
split-pdf-into-individual-pages.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save them to a specified output folder.

remove-first-and-last-pages-from-pdf.title: Remove First and Last Pages from PDF
remove-first-and-last-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete the first and last pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.Delete method with a page number array.

split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page-streams.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified End Page Using Streams
split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page-streams.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF in memory from the first page up to a given page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with input and output streams.

split-pdf-from-page-to-end__v2.title: Split PDF from Specific Page to End
split-pdf-from-page-to-end__v2.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToEnd to extract all pages from a given start page through the end of a PDF and save the result as a new file.

delete-pages-from-pdf-file-path.title: Delete Pages 2‑5 from PDF Using File Path Overload
delete-pages-from-pdf-file-path.description: Demonstrates how to remove specific pages (2 through 5) from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfFileEditor with the file‑path overload.

split-pdf-into-bulk-ranges.title: Split PDF into Bulk Ranges Using MemoryStreams
split-pdf-into-bulk-ranges.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks with a read‑only stream to split a PDF into defined page ranges and obtain each bulk as a MemoryStream.

create-pdf-booklet.title: Create Booklet PDF with Aspose.Pdf
create-pdf-booklet.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF from an existing file using PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet with default settings.

extract-front-pages-using-splitfromfirst.title: Extract Front Pages from PDF Using SplitFromFirst and Streams
extract-front-pages-using-splitfromfirst.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF from the first page up to a specified end page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with in‑memory streams, then optionally save the result to a file.

measure-pdf-concatenation-performance.title: Measure PDF Concatenation Performance Using Streams
measure-pdf-concatenation-performance.description: Demonstrates concatenating fifty small PDF files with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor using the stream overload and measuring the execution time with Stopwatch.

concatenate-multiple-pdfs-pdffileeditor.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs Using PdfFileEditor
concatenate-multiple-pdfs-pdffileeditor.description: Demonstrates how to merge three PDF files into a single document by using the three‑argument overload of the PdfFileEditor.Concatenate method from Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-selected-pages-into-pdf-using-str.title: Insert Selected Pages into PDF Using Streams
insert-selected-pages-into-pdf-using-str.description: Demonstrates how to insert specific pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a given position using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with stream‑based processing.

log-batch-booklet-creation.title: Log Batch Booklet Creation with Aspose PDF
log-batch-booklet-creation.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor while logging each step to an audit file for traceability.

create-booklet-pdf-with-custom-page-size.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Page Size Using Streams
create-booklet-pdf-with-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF from an existing document using streams and specifying a custom page size (e.g., A5) with Aspose.Pdf.

split-pdf-into-bulk-page-ranges.title: Split PDF into Bulk Page Ranges Using Aspose.Pdf
split-pdf-into-bulk-page-ranges.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into multiple files based on defined start‑end page ranges using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

batch-delete-pages-from-multiple-pdfs.title: Batch Delete Pages from Multiple PDFs
batch-delete-pages-from-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files in a folder and delete specified pages from each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-page-range-into-pdf-using-streams.title: Insert Page Range into PDF Using Streams
insert-page-range-into-pdf-using-streams.description: Demonstrates how to insert a specific range of pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF by using file streams and the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Insert method.

split-pdf-into-multiple-page-ranges.title: Split PDF into Multiple Page Ranges Using SplitToBulks
split-pdf-into-multiple-page-ranges.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate documents based on defined page ranges using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks and save each part to disk.

delete-pages-resize-pdf.title: Delete Pages and Resize PDF Content
delete-pages-resize-pdf.description: Shows how to remove specific pages from a PDF and then shrink the contents of the remaining pages before saving the document.

create-booklet-a5-pdf.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom A5 Page Size
create-booklet-a5-pdf.description: Demonstrates generating a booklet from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with the A5 page size overload.

insert-multiple-pages-into-pdf.title: Insert Multiple Pages into a PDF
insert-multiple-pages-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert selected pages from several source PDFs into a target PDF in a single operation using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages__v2.title: Split PDF into Individual Page Files
split-pdf-into-individual-pages__v2.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDF files saved with a naming template.

rotate-first-pdf-page-save-to-memorystre.title: Rotate First PDF Page and Save to MemoryStream
rotate-first-pdf-page-save-to-memorystre.description: Loads a PDF, rotates the first page 90° clockwise, and saves the modified document directly into a MemoryStream without writing to disk.

load-pdf-document-get-page-count.title: Load PDF Document and Get Page Count
load-pdf-document-get-page-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and retrieve the total number of pages.

measure-pdf-resize-performance-file-path.title: Measure PDF Resize Performance: File Path vs Stream
measure-pdf-resize-performance-file-path.description: Demonstrates how to resize a large PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and compares the execution time of the file‑path overload versus the stream overload.

resize-pdf-to-letter-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Letter Size
resize-pdf-to-letter-size.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor to change all pages of a PDF to Letter dimensions (8.5" x 11") and save the resized document.

split-pdf-into-individual-page-pdfs.title: Split PDF into Individual Page PDFs Using Streams
split-pdf-into-individual-page-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDFs by using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to obtain MemoryStream objects for each page and writing them to files.

resize-pdf-pages-8-5x11-stream.title: Resize PDF Pages to 8.5x11 Inches Using Stream Overload
resize-pdf-pages-8-5x11-stream.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom page size of 8.5×11 inches for all pages of a PDF using PdfFileEditor’s stream‑based ResizeContents method.

split-pdf-into-individual-page-streams.title: Split PDF into Individual Page Streams
split-pdf-into-individual-page-streams.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate pages and retrieve each page as a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-pdfs-using-stream-overloads.title: Concatenate PDFs Using Stream Overloads
concatenate-pdfs-using-stream-overloads.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple PDF files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with stream overloads, handling command‑line arguments and automatic stream disposal.

merge-pdf-streams-into-single-pdf.title: Merge Multiple PDF Streams into a Single PDF
merge-pdf-streams-into-single-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate several PDF input streams into one output PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor, including proper stream handling and optional placeholder PDF creation.

batch-concatenate-pdfs.title: Batch Concatenate PDFs in a Folder
batch-concatenate-pdfs.description: Shows how to gather all PDF files from a directory and merge them into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-pdfs.title: Create Booklet PDFs from Multiple Files
create-booklet-pdfs.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF for each source PDF in a folder and store each result in a dedicated output subdirectory.

create-booklet-pdf-left-odd-pages.title: Create Booklet PDF with Left Pages as Odd Numbers
create-booklet-pdf-left-odd-pages.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to generate a booklet from a PDF stream, specifying odd-numbered left pages and even-numbered right pages.

concatenate-pdfs-from-memory-streams.title: Concatenate PDFs from Memory Streams to File
concatenate-pdfs-from-memory-streams.description: Demonstrates merging multiple PDF documents held in memory streams into a single PDF file directly using Aspose.Pdf.Facades without creating intermediate files.

delete-pdf-pages-verify-count.title: Delete PDF Pages and Verify Page Count
delete-pdf-pages-verify-count.description: Demonstrates deleting specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and validating that the page count is reduced as expected.

delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.title: Delete Pages and Concatenate PDFs
delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove specific pages from a PDF and then merge the edited PDF with another document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

create-pdf-booklet-custom-page-order.title: Create PDF Booklet with Custom Page Order
create-pdf-booklet-custom-page-order.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF by specifying left‑hand and right‑hand page sequences using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-pdf-interleaving-pages.title: Create Booklet PDF by Interleaving Specified Pages
create-booklet-pdf-interleaving-pages.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF by selecting left and right page ranges from an existing PDF and interleaving them using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-nup-pdf-3x2.title: Batch Create 3‑by‑2 N‑up PDFs
batch-nup-pdf-3x2.description: Demonstrates how to process multiple PDF files and generate N‑up versions with three columns and two rows using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-with-custom-left-right-pa.title: Create Booklet with Custom Left/Right Page Order
create-booklet-with-custom-left-right-pa.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF by separating odd (left) and even (right) pages into custom page arrays and passing them to Aspose.Pdf's MakeBooklet method.

split-pdf-from-start-to-end.title: Split PDF from Start Page to End Using MemoryStream
split-pdf-from-start-to-end.description: Shows how to extract the portion of a PDF starting at a given page through the end and return it as a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-delete-pages-merge-pdfs.title: Batch Delete Pages and Merge PDFs
batch-delete-pages-merge-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove specified pages from several PDF files and then concatenate the cleaned PDFs into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-2up-pdf-layout.title: Create 2‑up PDF Layout with PdfFileEditor
create-2up-pdf-layout.description: Demonstrates how to generate a 2‑up (two pages per sheet) PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade and save the result to a new file.

delete-pdf-pages-with-error-handling.title: Delete PDF Pages with File‑Path Overload and Error Handling
delete-pdf-pages-with-error-handling.description: Demonstrates how to delete specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Delete (file‑path overload) while handling missing input files and output directory issues.

log-deleted-pages-during-pdf-delete-oper.title: Log Deleted Pages During PDF Delete Operations
log-deleted-pages-during-pdf-delete-oper.description: Shows how to delete specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades while logging the number of pages removed for each delete operation and saving the final document.

batch-resize-pdfs-to-a4.title: Batch Resize PDFs to A4 Using PdfPageEditor
batch-resize-pdfs-to-a4.description: Shows how to loop through all PDF files in a folder and resize each document to A4 page size using the Aspose.Pdf PdfPageEditor facade.

create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Page Size
create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF with a 5.5×8.5‑inch custom page size from an input PDF stream using Aspose.Pdf.

split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end-using-s.title: Split PDF from Start Page to End Using In-Memory Streams
split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end-using-s.description: Demonstrates splitting a PDF document from a specified start page to the end using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToEnd with FileStream and MemoryStream, and optionally saving the result to a file.

test-delete-invalid-page-number.title: Test Delete Throws Exception for Invalid Page Number
test-delete-invalid-page-number.description: Demonstrates an NUnit unit test that verifies PdfFileEditor.Delete raises a PdfException when attempting to delete a page beyond the document's length.

create-nup-and-booklet-pdf.title: Create N‑up Layout and Convert to Booklet PDF
create-nup-and-booklet-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a 2×2 N‑up PDF and then transform it into a printable booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-two-pdfs-using-pdffileeditor.title: Concatenate Two PDFs Using PdfFileEditor
concatenate-two-pdfs-using-pdffileeditor.description: Shows how to merge two PDF files on disk into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfFileEditor and its Concatenate method.

merge-multiple-pdfs-with-logging.title: Merge Multiple PDFs with Logging using PdfFileEditor
merge-multiple-pdfs-with-logging.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate several PDF files into a single document while logging the input and output file names using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-pdf-from-stream.title: Create Booklet PDF from Stream
create-booklet-pdf-from-stream.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor directly from an input stream and return the result as a MemoryStream.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdfs.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDFs in a Folder
delete-specific-pages-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove pages 3 and 4 from each PDF in a source directory and write the modified files to an output directory using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-selected-pages-into-pdf.title: Insert Selected Pages into PDF
insert-selected-pages-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Insert to insert specific pages from a source PDF into a target PDF at a defined position, producing a concatenated document.

delete-pdf-pages-get-size.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF and Get Resulting Size
delete-pdf-pages-get-size.description: Demonstrates how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and return the size of the modified file.

create-booklet-pdf-delete-resize.title: Create Booklet PDF by Deleting Pages and Resizing Content
create-booklet-pdf-delete-resize.description: Demonstrates how to take a PDF stream, remove specified pages, resize the remaining page contents, and convert the result into a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-multiple-pdfs.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs into a Single Document
concatenate-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to merge several PDF files into one using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor class from the command line.

delete-pdf-pages-2up-layout.title: Delete PDF Pages and Apply 2‑up Layout
delete-pdf-pages-2up-layout.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and then create a 2‑up (two pages per sheet) layout before saving the result.

parallel-delete-pages-from-pdfs.title: Parallel Deletion of Pages from Multiple PDFs
parallel-delete-pages-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to delete specified pages from a collection of PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and Parallel.ForEach, saving the results with a modified filename.

concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.title: Concatenate PDFs and Add Page Numbers
concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF files into a single document and automatically insert page numbers using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

test-makebooklet-throws-exception-null-p.title: Test MakeBooklet Throws Exception for Null Page Order Arrays
test-makebooklet-throws-exception-null-p.description: Demonstrates how to verify that PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet raises an exception when the left‑pages or right‑pages arrays are null, using a temporary one‑page PDF as input.

delete-specified-pages-from-pdfs.title: Delete Specified Pages from PDFs
delete-specified-pages-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to remove given page numbers from multiple PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save the cleaned files with a suffix.

batch-resize-pdf-a5-booklet.title: Batch Resize PDFs to A5 and Create Booklet
batch-resize-pdf-a5-booklet.description: Shows how to iterate over PDFs in a folder, resize each document to A5 using PdfPageEditor, and then generate a booklet version with PdfFileEditor.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF using PdfFileEditor
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove selected pages from a PDF document by using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with input and output streams.

delete-pages-make-booklet.title: Delete Pages and Create Booklet PDF
delete-pages-make-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to remove selected pages from a PDF using PdfFileEditor.TryDelete and then generate a booklet layout with PdfFileEditor.TryMakeBooklet, including temporary file handling.

compare-pdf-concatenate-memory-usage.title: Memory Comparison of PdfFileEditor Concatenate Overloads
compare-pdf-concatenate-memory-usage.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate PDFs using both file‑path and stream overloads of PdfFileEditor and measures the private memory consumption of each approach.

merge-pdfs-from-urls.title: Merge PDFs from URLs without Temporary Files
merge-pdfs-from-urls.description: Shows how to download PDF files as streams from HTTP URLs and concatenate them directly into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, avoiding intermediate files.

create-4up-pdf-in-memory.title: Create 4‑up PDF in Memory Using PdfFileEditor
create-4up-pdf-in-memory.description: Demonstrates applying a 4‑up (2 × 2) layout to an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor via the stream overload and keeping the result in a MemoryStream.

delete-pdf-pages.title: Delete Specific Pages from a PDF
delete-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and write the modified document to a new file.

pdffileeditor-concatenate-empty-input-te.title: PdfFileEditor Concatenate Throws on Empty Input Test
pdffileeditor-concatenate-empty-input-te.description: Shows a unit test that verifies PdfFileEditor.Concatenate raises an ArgumentException when the input stream array is empty.

pdf-concatenation-with-aspose-pdffileedi.title: PDF Concatenation with Aspose PdfFileEditor
pdf-concatenation-with-aspose-pdffileedi.description: Demonstrates merging multiple PDF files by opening each as a stream, using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to concatenate them, and saving the combined document to a file.

validate-pdf-concatenation-page-order.title: Validate PDF Concatenation Preserves Page Order
validate-pdf-concatenation-page-order.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf, extract page text with TextAbsorber, and verify that the original page order is maintained after merging.

create-booklet-from-second-half-right-pa.title: Create Booklet from Second Half Right Pages
create-booklet-from-second-half-right-pa.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF that includes only the right‑hand pages from the second half of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's MakeBooklet method.

concatenate-pdfs-in-zip.title: Concatenate PDFs Inside a ZIP Archive
concatenate-pdfs-in-zip.description: Shows how to read PDF files from a zip archive, merge them using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and write the merged PDF back into the same archive.

delete-and-resize-pdf-pages.title: Delete and Resize PDF Pages
delete-and-resize-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete selected pages, adjust the page size, and return the modified document as a MemoryStream.

create-booklet-pdfs-custom-page-sizes.title: Create Booklet PDFs with Custom Page Sizes
create-booklet-pdfs-custom-page-sizes.description: Demonstrates generating booklet PDFs from existing documents using PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet with predefined and custom page sizes, and verifies the resulting files.

concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-pages.title: Concatenate PDFs with Blank Pages
concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-pages.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF files into a single document while automatically inserting a blank page between each source PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-resize-pdfs-concatenate.title: Batch Resize PDFs and Concatenate into One Document
batch-resize-pdfs-concatenate.description: Shows how to resize multiple PDF files to 1024 × 768 points using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and then merge the resized PDFs into a single document.

add-blank-separator-pages-when-merging-p.title: Add Blank Separator Pages When Merging PDFs
add-blank-separator-pages-when-merging-p.description: Shows how to insert a temporary blank page between PDF files and concatenate them into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-landscape-booklet.title: Resize PDF to Landscape and Create Booklet
resize-pdf-landscape-booklet.description: Shows how to rotate all pages of a PDF to landscape orientation using PdfPageEditor and then generate a booklet from the rotated document with PdfFileEditor.

create-custom-booklet-with-page-order.title: Create Custom Booklet with Specified Page Order
create-custom-booklet-with-page-order.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet with custom left and right page arrays to control booklet pagination, then reads the generated PDF to display the original page numbers.

create-booklet-pdf-left-pages.title: Create Booklet PDF Using Left Pages of First Half
create-booklet-pdf-left-pages.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF by selecting the left pages from the first half of a source PDF and invoking Aspose.Pdf's MakeBooklet method.

remove-pages-from-multiple-pdfs-in-paral.title: Remove Pages from Multiple PDFs in Parallel
remove-pages-from-multiple-pdfs-in-paral.description: Demonstrates how to delete specified pages from a collection of PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

resize-pdf-pages-to-custom-pixel-dimensi.title: Resize PDF Pages to Custom Pixel Dimensions Using Stream Overload
resize-pdf-pages-to-custom-pixel-dimensi.description: Demonstrates resizing all pages of a PDF to 1024x768 pixels with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents stream overload and verifies the resulting page dimensions.

concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.title: Concatenate PDFs and Preserve Metadata with PdfFileEditor
concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor while keeping outlines, logical structure, user rights, and copying original metadata (author, title, subject, keywords) to the merged document.

resize-pdfs-create-booklet.title: Resize PDFs and Create a Booklet
resize-pdfs-create-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to resize each page of multiple PDF files to 1024x768, concatenate them into a single PDF, and then generate a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
